description: Compact 4B reranker with Q4_K_M quantization (2.5 GB) — best quality/size tradeoff for multilingual RAG reranking.
fullDescription:
## IMPORTANT NOTE ##
This model runs on CPU only. If you want to run it on GPU, please install the generic version of Ollama program.

This is a shared app. Once installed by the Olares Admin, all users in the cluster can use it through reference app.

## MODEL OVERVIEW ##
Qwen3-Reranker-4B is a compact text reranking model from Alibaba's Qwen team, built on the Qwen3-4B-Base architecture with 36 layers. It is designed for ranking and retrieval tasks across multilingual contexts.

The model supports 100+ languages with instruction-aware capabilities for task customization. It scores 69.76 on MTEB-R benchmarks, ranking among top-performing multilingual reranking models.

**Note:** As of June 2025, Ollama doesn't fully support reranking models in Ragflow/Dify. Alternatives include FastGPT or vLLM deployment.

## QUANTIZATION ##
This model uses **Q4_K_M** quantization (2.5 GB). Quantization compresses model weights from 16-bit to 4-bit precision, reducing memory usage ~4x with minimal quality loss. The K-quant method keeps critical layers at higher precision.

## Model Details
- Model Name: Qwen/Qwen3-Reranker-4B
- Parameters: 4B
- Quantization: Q4_K_M (2.5GB)
- Context Length: 32768 tokens
- Task: Text Reranking
- Languages: 100+
modelReadme:
Qwen3-Reranker-4B is a compact text reranking model from Alibaba's Qwen team, built on the Qwen3-4B-Base architecture with 36 layers. It supports 100+ languages with instruction-aware capabilities for task customization. It scores 69.76 on MTEB-R benchmarks, ranking among top-performing multilingual reranking models.

Three quantized versions available: Q4_K_M (2.5GB), Q5_K_M (2.9GB), Q8_0 (4.3GB). Q4_K_M recommended for most users.

Note: As of June 2025, Ollama doesn't fully support reranking models in RAGflow, Dify, and FastGPT. Alternatives include API-based or vLLM deployment.
name: qwen3-reranker-4b
title: Qwen3 Reranker 4B (Ollama)
